content: No rooms match this filter. Try a different one or clear filter to view all rooms.

comment.text: "No rooms match this filter. This message is displayed when a user searches for rooms that don't meet their criteria and is typically shown on an empty screen after clearing filters or changing search parameters."

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'մաքուր զտիչ' (makur ztich) is a literal/calque translation of 'clear filter' that sounds unnatural in Armenian. In this context, 'clear' is a verb (to clear/reset), but the translation uses it as an adjective/noun combination meaning 'clean filter'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ոչ մի սենյակ չի համապատասխանում այս ֆիլտրին: Փորձեք մեկ այլ կամ ջնջեք զտիչը՝ բոլոր սենյակները դիտելու համար:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Lao translation 'ຫຼືຕົວກັ່ນຕອງທີ່ຈະແຈ້ງ' (or filter that will be clear) is grammatically broken and conveys a confusing meaning. It fails to correctly translate 'clear filter to view all rooms' as an instruction/action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ບໍ່ມີຫ້ອງໃດກົງກັບຕົວກອງນີ້. ລອງໃຊ້ອັນອື່ນ ຫຼື ລ້າງຕົວກອງເພື່ອເບິ່ງທຸກຫ້ອງ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'escolha limpar os filtros' (choose to clear the filters) is a clunky and unnatural translation of 'clear filter'. It changes the instructional tone from a direct action to a choice of an action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nenhum quarto corresponde a este filtro. Tente um filtro diferente ou limpe o filtro para ver todas as salas.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'ose të pastër' is grammatically incorrect and changes the meaning. In Albanian, 'të pastër' means 'clean' (adjective), whereas the English 'clear filter' requires the verb 'pastroni' (to clear).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Asnjë dhomë nuk përputhet me këtë filtër. Provoni një filtër të ndryshëm ose pastroni filtrin për të parë të gjitha dhomat.
